2023-24 George Washington Revolutionaries Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 15-17 (4-14, 15th in A-10 MBB)

Coach: Chris Caputo

PS/G: 76.8 (88th of 362)

PA/G: 77.2 (320th of 362)

SRS: -1.03 (169th of 362)

SOS: -0.06 (143rd of 362)
